description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly dark gray coloration. The surface is coarse and uneven, featuring a mix of fine and larger grain textures, with visible speckles of lighter minerals embedded throughout. The rock has a jagged peak on one side, giving it a somewhat triangular silhouette from certain angles, while the opposite side appears broader and flatter. Subtle variations in color, including hints of bluish-gray and white, suggest a composition of multiple mineral types. The rock's mass and density are apparent from its solid, compact form, and it lacks any visible cavities or openings. Its natural, unpolished appearance makes it suitable as a landscape or barrier element in urban environments such as parks or roadside edges.
description: A rugged, dark gray rock with a jagged peak and coarse, speckled surface, featuring angular and irregular contours. Its solid, dense form and natural texture make it suitable as an urban barrier or landscape element.
description_view_0: Seen from above, the rock appears broad and flat with a rough, mottled surface and subtle color variations.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rock's sharp, triangular peak and steep, angular face, emphasizing its height.
description_view_2: From this angle, the rock looks blockier and more compact, with a visible mix of dark and light mineral speckles.
description_view_3: Another side view showing the jagged peak and sloped surface, with pronounced texture and angularity.
